_README: Copy to capture-policy.json and adjust. Per-channel capture policy — who may write to each memory channel and in what state. Checked by checks/capture-policy-check.py; the normative-paths are enforced by hooks/normative-write-guard.py (ask-confirmation on write).
_levels: off = no capture to this channel (only ratified entries may exist, and nothing new is expected) | propose = only ratified entries may exist (confidence: verified + ratified trace) | draft = unverified entries allowed — they land in the ratification inbox (memory-audit --pending)
_normative-paths: paths whose writes always require explicit human confirmation (ask guard) — implicitly propose; adjust to the host project's instruction files
